title: Virus Information Center
body: General Virus Information Learn more about computer viruses and how they operate. What is a virus? Virus Prevention Get protected! Windows 10 comes with a copy of Windows Defender, and staff/faculty with MacOS can download Trend Micro for their personal computers for free. Windows: Windows Defender - Enabling Antivirus and Threat Protection & Windows Firewall MacOS: Trend Micro - Endpoint Security for Personally Owned macOS Devices Virus Prevention Tips Virus Removal Learn how to use antivirus software to help you recover from virus infections. Windows Performing an Online Virus Scan with Housecall Mac Running a Scan with Trend Micro Virus Rescue Service Have a virus problem you can't figure out yourself? Let DoIT come to the rescue! Get Help from DoIT
